attempts.reflection: You need to obtain a stone pickaxe before attempting to mine cobblestone. Specifically, after crafting the crafting table in Step 8, use it to mine cobblestone in subsequent steps. This will allow you to craft the necessary stone pickaxe in Step 9, enabling further progress. Additionally, ensure you mine enough oak logs to craft oak planks and sticks before attempting more complex crafts like the stone pickaxe.

attempts.reflection: You repeated the crafting of the stone_pickaxe three times (Steps 84, 86, 89) without gathering enough cobblestone. Additionally, you tried to smelt iron ore into iron ingots (Step 98) and craft a furnace (Step 100) before having the necessary resources and tools. To fix this, first gather at least 8 cobblestones for the crafting table, then use it to craft a furnace and smelt iron ore into iron ingots. After obtaining the furnace, you can then proceed to craft the stone_pickaxe and other necessary items.
